ground_truth_summary: Python traceback: $ python app.py -> psycopg2.OperationalError (password auth failed for user 'app') at db.internal (10.0.0.5):5432, then ConnectionError during handling, exit code 1. Stack: main.py:42 (db = connect(DB_URL)) and db.py:18 (raise ConnectionError).

key_hits: main.py:42 and db.py:18 with exact code lines
judgments.justification: Verbatim transcription block is perfect, including the critical 'psycopg2' spelling. All key facts, paths, line numbers, IP, port, and exit code are exactly right. Color and structure commentary is accurate.

key_misses: verbatim block omits the 'During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:' separator phrasing (compressed)
judgments.justification: All critical tokens correct including psycopg2 spelling. Slight condensation of the 'During handling' separator in the verbatim block, but no factual errors. Strong OCR with correct library name.

key_hits: main.py line 42, db.py line 18 with exact code
judgments.justification: Verbatim transcription line-by-line is essentially perfect. The critical psycopg2 spelling is preserved exactly. All structural elements (colors, indentation, nested exception) captured. Excellent for a 9B flash model at Q8.

key_misses: claims final exit code line is 'red' text when it is actually green
judgments.justification: All textual tokens including psycopg2 spelling are correct. Minor color mislabel (says exit code in red, but elsewhere acknowledges exit code separately) does not affect factual content of the error. Strong transcription.

key_hits: db.py line 18 raise ConnectionError(f"Failed to connect: {e}")
judgments.justification: Verbatim block is complete and exact, including the critical psycopg2 spelling. All paths, line numbers, host/IP/port, and exit code correct. Color commentary accurate (red errors, green exit).

key_hits: main.py line 42, db.py line 18 exact code
judgments.justification: Verbatim block is complete and exact with correct psycopg2 spelling. All structural facts (files, lines, IP, port, nested exception, exit code) are accurate. Excellent nothink output.

key_misses: library name spelled 'psycopg' (missing the '2') in both the verbatim block AND throughout the analysis
hallucinations: psycopg.OperationalError — hallucinated library name; the image clearly says psycopg2. This is the exact severe hallucination flagged in the task.
judgments.justification: This is the severe hallucination case: the model wrote 'psycopg.OperationalError' (missing the '2') in the verbatim transcription AND propagated that error through its analysis. The 'think' mode led it to substitute the modern psycopg (3) package name for the actual psycopg2 in the image. Other facts are correct, but this is a load-bearing OCR error on the most critical token.

key_hits: main.py line 42, db.py line 18 exact code
judgments.justification: Verbatim transcription is exact with correct psycopg2 spelling. All facts (paths, lines, IP, port, nested exception, exit code) correct. Nothink mode produced clean, accurate output with no library-name confusion.

Verbatim block exact with correct psycopg2 spelling. All paths, line numbers, IP, port, nested exception, and exit code accurate. Notably, the 9B think variant avoided the psycopg->psycopg hallucination that afflicted the 4B think variant, suggesting the larger model resisted the substitution.

summary.note: 8 of 9 Q8 variants correctly preserved the critical 'psycopg2' spelling. Only qwen3.5-4b-Q8|think hallucinated 'psycopg' (missing the 2), the exact failure mode flagged as severe. Notably the 4B nothink variant was perfect while the 4B think variant failed — suggesting thinking mode triggered the package-name substitution on the smaller model. The 9B think variant resisted this trap.
